prestazioni: VQ35DE (Rev-Up variant, 3.5L V6) forced induction via Garrett GT3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) with custom 3-inch stainless steel turbo-back exhaust featuring a Tomei 80mm titanium tip and GReddy Revolution RS 70mm downpipe, paired with a HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve and AEM 3.5bar MAP sensor for precise boost control at 12 psi

Full bolt-on internals upgrade including JE FSR forged pistons (8.8:1 compression), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a Tomei Type-M 264°/260° camshaft set with Tomei adjustable cam gears, reinforced with ARP head studs and ACL Race Series main bearings for 550+ whp reliability

Custom Motec M150 ECU with Nissan 350Z-specific CAN bus integration, running a flex-fuel ethanol sensor and dual Bosch 028 high-flow fuel pumps, fed by Injector Dynamics ID1000 fuel injectors and a Tomei 80mm titanium intake plenum with K&N 9-inch conical filters for optimized airflow
estetica: Veilside Fortune 350Z widebody conversion kit with custom carbon fiber overfenders, paired with a Rocket Bunny V3 rear bumper and a Seibon carbon fiber hood featuring a custom 3-inch cowl scoop for direct intercooler ducting

Ohlins DFV Road & Track coilovers with 8kg/mm front and 10kg/mm rear springs, adjustable top mounts, and custom valving for track use, complemented by Cusco Type RS 22mm front and 20mm rear adjustable sway bars and Energy Suspension polyurethane bushings

Work Meister S1 3P 18x9.5 +22 front and 18x10.5 +30 rear wheels wrapped in Toyo R888R 255/40/18 and 285/35/18 tires, with custom AP Racing CP6640-2600 front and CP6630-2450 rear brake calipers, 356mm two-piece rotors, and Ferodo DS2500 brake pads
